overview.description: Czech AI services company building chatbots, AI avatars, and process automation for businesses
overview.description_long: GROVE TECH AI s.r.o. helps Czech companies save time and money through custom AI solutions — conversational chatbots, photorealistic AI avatars (via HeyGen/D-ID), business process automation (RPA/workflow), AI integrations, predictive analytics, and AI consulting. They also develop software using 'vibe coding', an AI-assisted development approach. Case studies include HR onboarding avatars, medical AI doctor avatars, energy-market B2B consultants, internal knowledge bases, and sales automation bots.

history.origin_story: Founded in June 2024 in Prague (Vinohrady) by Ondřej Veselý and Oldřich Grulich. Third co-owner Jiří Bruijn joined in July 2025. Registered as GROVE TECH AI s.r.o. (IČO 21707146). Veselý and Grulich are also co-directors of a related entity, Grove Minds AI s.r.o.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague (June 2024), registered with Municipal Court Prague
Third shareholder Jiří Bruijn joined; first annual accounts filed (2024 fiscal year)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: GROVE TECH AI is an AI systems integrator building solutions on top of commercial models (OpenAI, HeyGen, D-ID). There is no proprietary model, dataset, or deep technical moat — their value is in implementation expertise and client relationships, which can be replicated as foundation models become easier to deploy directly.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Demand for AI implementation and automation services in Czech SMEs is real and growing. However, the market is crowded with many similar boutique AI agencies, and larger consultancies (Deloitte, Accenture) are also expanding AI implementation services.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No external funding found. Registered capital is only 8,000 CZK — the statutory minimum. Founded in mid-2024 with 3 co-owners and a very small team, the company has no visible runway beyond early project revenue.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A very early-stage (founded June 2024), bootstrapped AI consulting/services firm with minimal capital, no proprietary technology moat, and high dependency on third-party AI platforms. While the Czech SME market presents genuine demand, the combination of no funding, thin technical differentiation, and a crowded competitive landscape makes this a high-risk entry.

metadata.notes: Company also operates a related entity 'Grove Minds AI s.r.o.' at the same address (Varšavská 715/36, Prague), with the same two managing directors. IČO 21707146. Very new company — first annual accounts filed for 2024 fiscal year in July 2025.
